userMessage: Set CH1 to 3.3V scale DC 1Mohm for SCL, CH2 to 3.3V DC 1Mohm for SDA. Set up I2C decode on B1 clock CH1 threshold 1.65V data CH2 threshold 1.65V. Add setup time measurement between CH1 falling edge and CH2 falling edge. Add hold time measurement between CH2 falling edge and CH1 rising edge. Set trigger on B1 I2C address 0x48 direction write. Single acquisition. Query setup and hold time results. Save both channels as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request.

Verified in this turn:
- `CH<x>:SCAle`
- `CH<x>:COUPling`
- `CH<x>:TERmination`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:CLOCk:THReshold`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:SOUrce`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:THReshold`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:DIRection`
- `ACQuire:STOPAfter`
- `ACQuire:STATE`
- `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TYPe`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:DELay:EDGE<x>`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?`

Still not sufficiently verified for applyable output:
- the exact SCPI to set the trigger type to I2C bus/address and program address `0x48`
- the exact MSO4/5/6 measurement configuration commands to bind `SETUP` and `HOLD` measurements to `CH1`/`CH2` with the requested edge pairings

Because those are required to satisfy your request, I have to fail closed rather than guess. If you want, next turn I can build it as soon as those exact headers are verified.
